---
title: "Groundwater Governance in Nebraska"
subtitle: "Ownership, Allocation, Regulation, and Transferability"
author: "Robert C. Cline, CPL"

date: today
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"

paper-number: "RP-2026-001"
version: "0.1.0"
status: "Working Draft"

keywords:
  - Nebraska
  - Groundwater
  - Water Law
  - Natural Resources Districts
  - Irrigation
  - Water Transfers

abstract: |
  This paper examines the legal, administrative, and technical framework
  governing groundwater ownership, allocation, and regulation in Nebraska,
  with particular emphasis on Natural Resources Districts, groundwater
  allocation practices, and the legal mechanisms governing the transfer
  of groundwater rights.

execute:
  freeze: auto
---
